message:
test(bench): null and non-positive metric validators for phase1 matrix cells

Add 4 new phase1_matrix_validator tests:
- rejects_null_pass_cell_primary_e2e_metric: null rust_vs_node_ratio
- rejects_null_pass_primary_outcomes_metric: null wall_clock_ms
- rejects_non_positive_fail_cell_primary_e2e_metric: zero rust_vs_bun_ratio
- rejects_non_positive_fail_primary_outcomes_metric: zero rust_vs_node_ratio

These close edge case gaps in matrix validation — null values were
previously accepted silently, and non-positive fail-cell metrics
weren't validated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
